items.title: 3 Button Chronomancer Power 32.2k
items.rotation: Sword 5 above Well of Action. Spam F1 off cooldown.
items.explanation:
This is a beginner/low intensity mesmer build for fractal/raid/strike content.

0:00 Rotation
2:23 Rundown
items.cleaned_transcript:
Hey all. For the build rundown, all we really want to do is spam your Phantasmal Swordsman. It is your highest-priority skill, followed by your wells. If you're looking at the three-button version, it's just going to be Well of Action. If you're looking at the five-button version, then Sword 5 is above spamming both of your wells. Your F1 you can spam off cooldown. You'll never quite generate enough clones to get the full shatter, so you can just spam it off cooldown.

For the notable skills, your skill 4 is a CC if you recast it. F3 Time Sink is also a CC. F4 Distortion is just damage mitigation and invulnerability. These builds don't use Continuum Split. However, you can use Continuum Split to combo with your utilities. One of the more popular combos is using it with a heavy CC skill like Signet of Humility, also called Moa Signet. To show how it works, you basically enter Continuum Split, cast whatever you want to cast, and then go back. Whatever you cast during Continuum Split is not taken back with you when you effectively go back in time as the Chronomancer.

As you can see, you can cast your elite twice and take down a whole bunch of break bar by yourself. But beware: Continuum Split leaves behind a point that you teleport back to. It can be destroyed, and there will be some fights where that can screw you over, so be very careful. One place I can think of is Xera. If you Continuum Split outside the dome and then go back when Xera does her one-shot attack, you can die, so be careful with your positioning.

For your utilities, Moa Signet can be replaced with Gravity Well. This does a bit more defiance break damage, but it just takes a little longer. It's not as bursty as Moa Signet. Mass Invisibility and Time Warp can technically be used, but they're really niche scenarios. You probably just want to stick to Signet of Humility since you don't have to aim it.

Mesmer in general has a lot of really strong utility skills. Well of Precognition gives stability and Aegis. Well of Senility boon strips and dazes. Feedback is a projectile reflect. Portal Entre is the classic Mesmer portal. Blink is a really strong skill and also a stun break. This can be useful for dodging specific mechanics or, for example, blinking over Sabetha's flame wall and nullifying the mechanic entirely. Those are some of the more interesting skills. That's the build rundown, and I hope you all enjoy the build. Thank you for watching.

items.title: 5 Button Chronomancer Power 35.3k
items.rotation: Sword 5 and Heal combo above the 2 wells. Spam F1 off cooldown.
items.explanation:
This is a beginner/low intensity mesmer build for fractal/raid/strike content.

0:00 Rotation
2:14 Rundown
items.cleaned_transcript:
Hey all. For the build rundown, all you really want to do is spam your Phantasmal Swordsman. It is your highest-priority skill, followed by your wells. If you're looking at the three-button build, it's just going to be Well of Action. If you're looking at the five-button build, then your Phantasmal Swordsman and heal combo is above spamming both of your wells. Your F1 you can spam off cooldown. You'll never quite generate enough clones to get the full shatter, so you can just spam it off cooldown.

For the notable skills, your skill 4 is a CC if you recast it. F3 Time Sink is also a CC. F4 Distortion is just damage mitigation and invulnerability. These builds don't use Continuum Split. However, you can use Continuum Split to combo with your utilities. One of the more popular combos is pairing it with a heavy CC skill like Signet of Humility, also called Moa Signet. You basically enter Continuum Split, cast whatever you want to cast, and then you go back. Whatever you cast during Continuum Split is not taken back with you when you effectively go back in time as a Chronomancer.

As you can see, you can cast your elite twice and take down a whole bunch of break bar by yourself. But beware: Continuum Split leaves behind a point that you will teleport back to. It can be destroyed, and there are fights where that can screw you over, so be really careful. One of the places I can think of is Xera. If you Continuum Split outside of the dome and then go back when Xera does her one-shot attack, you can die. Be careful with your positioning.

For your utilities, Moa Signet can be replaced with Gravity Well. This does a bit more defiance break damage, but it just takes a little longer. It's not as bursty as Moa Signet. Mesmer in general has a lot of really strong utility skills. Well of Precognition gives stability and Aegis. Well of Senility boon strips and dazes. Feedback is a projectile reflect. Portal Entre is the classic Mesmer portal. Blink is a strong skill that breaks stun and lets you teleport around. For example, on Sabetha you can Blink over the flame wall and basically nullify the mechanic entirely.

That's the build rundown, and I hope you all enjoy the build. Thank you for watching.

items.title: 3 Button Chronomancer Condi 32.3k
items.rotation: Spam Staff 3 + heal to reset Staff 3 off cooldown. Only shatter F2 at 3 clones.
items.explanation:
This is a beginner/low intensity mesmer build for fractal/raid/strike content.

0:00 Rotation
2:23 Rundown
items.cleaned_transcript:
Hey y'all. For the build rundown, basically all you want to do is spam your Phantasmal Warlock, use your heal skill to reset your Phantasmal Warlock, and spam Rewinder, which is your F2, whenever you have three clones. If you're looking at the four-button build, over the adds it's just spamming Chaos Armor. If you're looking at the three-button build, I would recommend looking at the four-button build because it's basically zero effort for a pretty substantial DPS increase.

For your notable skills, Staff 5 is a CC, F3 is a CC, and F4 is Distortion, an invulnerability. These builds don't use Continuum Split, but you can use Continuum Split to combo with an important utility skill, like a really big CC skill, and do a lot of breakbar damage. One of the more popular combos is Continuum Splitting a Moa Signet, which is your Signet of Humility.

For utilities, your Signet of Domination is a CC. I would recommend not using it unless you absolutely have to because it is a substantial DPS loss. You can run Gravity Well, which is a slightly less bursty CC option than Moa Signet. There are a few really good utilities that Mesmer has. You can replace your Signet of Illusions with one of them. Well of Precognition is stability and Aegis spam. Well of Senility is CC and boon strip. Feedback is a reflection dome. Portal Entre is the classic Mesmer portal. Phantasmal Disenchanter is also really good if you need boon strip. Blink is useful for dodging mechanics like Sabetha's flame wall.

That's the rundown of condi Chrono. I hope you all enjoy the build, and thank you.
